cases.title: TS-32: Non-admin POST /reports/export returns 403 Forbidden with ExportNotAllowed
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session (role is not TrainingOfficeAdmin per BR-09 condition)
Attendance data exists for export-eligible class-subject filters HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode ExportNotAllowed per validation-rules §4 BR-09 and roles-permissions §2.5
Assert Vietnamese message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu
Assert response body is not text/csv and contains no attendance data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created with actor instructorId per BR-09 outcome
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-32 satisfied: BR-09 blocks non-admin CSV export with localized permission error and denied attempt logged

cases.title: TS-33: TrainingOfficeAdmin CSV export permitted and audit-logged
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session (role satisfies BR-09 exception)
Closed sessions with mixed attendance exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101 in June 2026
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Assert CSV header contains institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at per API design §8.3
Query ExportAuditLog and assert success entry with adminId, filterSummary, and rowCount per domain model §4.12
cases.expected: BR-09 allows TrainingOfficeAdmin export: TS-33 satisfied with UTF-8 CSV download and ExportAuditLog on success

cases.title: ExportService.exportCsv rejects non-admin caller at role guard with real PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Closed sessions and attendance records for HESD-01 / SWE-101
ExportService wired with reporting-export module per domain model §7
Instructor userId with role Instructor (not TrainingOfficeAdmin)
steps: Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, instructorId)
Assert BR-09 role guard throws or returns denial before CSV generation
Assert no ExportAuditLog success row created for instructorId
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv with same filters and TrainingOfficeAdmin userId
Assert CSV buffer returned and ExportAuditLog success entry persisted in same DB transaction boundary
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: ExportService enforces BR-09 admin-only role guard at service layer with real DB; non-admin rejected, admin succeeds

cases.title: Denied export attempt writes ExportDenied security audit with actor and reason
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance data for export filters
ExportService or permission guard configured to log failed export per roles-permissions §2.6
Student userId with role Student
steps: Record security audit / ExportDenied log count before export attempt
Invoke export path with Student userId and valid filter body
Assert BR-09 denial before any CSV rows emitted
Query security audit store for new ExportDenied entry with actor studentId
Assert audit record includes denial reason referencing non-admin role per error-handling §6.2
Assert no ExportAuditLog success entry created for the denied attempt
cases.expected: BR-09 outcome: denied export attempt audit-logged with actor and reason per business rule and NFR-11

cases.title: POST /reports/export returns 403 Forbidden envelope for Instructor role
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session cookie
Valid export filter body with classCode, subjectCode, from, to
steps: Send POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON filter body and Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert Content-Type application/json (not text/csv)
Assert response body contains errorCode ExportNotAllowed
Assert response body contains message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu
Assert response body does not contain CSV header row or attendance rows
cases.expected: HTTP 403 contract for POST /reports/export when BR-09 role check fails; JSON error envelope with ExportNotAllowed

cases.title: POST /reports/export returns 200 with CSV attachment for TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie
Closed session attendance data exists within requested filter range
steps: Send POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } and admin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Assert Content-Disposition attachment; filename="attendance-export-<date>.csv" per API design §8.3
Assert response body is raw CSV text with header row as first line
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for POST /reports/export when BR-09 passes; CSV file stream returned to TrainingOfficeAdmin

cases.title: Instructor with report:read but without report:export denied CSV export
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read per BR-08
Instructor A lacks report:export per roles-permissions §2.2
Attendance data exists for assigned class-subject filters
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary for HESD-01 / SWE-101 using Instructor A session and assert HTTP 200 (report:read allowed)
POST /api/v1/reports/export with same filters using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode ExportNotAllowed
Assert message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu
Assert no CSV attachment in response
Verify ExportDenied audit log entry with actor instructorAId per BR-09
cases.expected: BR-09 rbac-negative: report:read does not imply report:export; instructor denied despite assigned report access

cases.title: Student POST /reports/export rejected with no peer data leak
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:export or report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Attendance data exists in system for other students in HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode ExportNotAllowed
Assert message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu
Assert response contains no peer attendance or roster data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created per BR-09 and error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: BR-09 rbac-negative: Student role denied CSV export with localized message; denied attempt logged; no data leak

cases.title: Flow D steps 3–4: Instructor export 403 versus TrainingOfficeAdmin export 200
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read
TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated
Closed session with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export for same filters and assert HTTP 200 with valid CSV
Assert admin export CSV contains attendance rows for session scope
Assert ExportAuditLog written for admin success and ExportDenied for instructor attempt
Confirm Flow D steps 3–4 per testing-plan §6 tags BR-09
cases.expected: Flow D export authorization: BR-09 denies instructor export, permits admin export with audit per testing-plan §6

cases.title: Direct API export bypassing UI still blocked for non-admin with no CSV payload
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with valid session cookie
Known attendance data that would be included if export were permitted
No UI interaction — raw HTTP client only
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export directly via HTTP client (no browser, no admin UI) using Instructor credentials
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden before any CSV stream begins
Assert errorCode ExportNotAllowed per validation-rules §4 BR-09
Assert response body length consistent with JSON error envelope only (no multi-kilobyte CSV leak)
Verify ExportDenied audit entry created proving server-side BR-09 enforcement independent of UI guard
cases.expected: BR-09 enforced at API layer: UI bypass attempt still denied with no CSV data returned; audit records denied attempt

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin completes /admin/export filter, confirm, and CSV download journey
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Closed sessions with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 for June 2026
Admin sidebar shows Xuất CSV navigation per page-list §5.6
steps: Navigate to /admin/export
Set class HESD-01, subject SWE-101, and date range 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 in ReportFilterBar
Verify CsvExportPanel shows Ready state with estimated row count
Click Xuất CSV and confirm export in ConfirmDialog with compliance note per forms-validation §4.7
Wait for browser download and verify success toast Đã tải xuống per ui-states §12
Open downloaded attendance-export CSV and verify required header columns
Verify export action visible only for admin role per ui-ux foundation BR-09 guard
cases.expected: BR-09 allows admin browser journey: filter → confirm → CSV download with required columns; export control admin-only in UI

cases.title: Instructor sees export denial with Vietnamese message; no CSV download
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Instructor may access /reports but lacks report:export
Export UI entry hidden or guarded per listing-pages §10 and ui-ux foundation BR-09
steps: Verify Xuất CSV navigation entry is hidden or disabled in instructor sidebar per page-list §10
Attempt to navigate to /admin/export or trigger export action if exposed
Verify UI shows ForbiddenPage, route guard redirect, or denial modal per page-list §2.2 and ui-states §12 Denied state
If export API invoked from UI, verify modal displays Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu with admin contact hint per error-handling §7
Verify no CSV file download initiated
Verify network tab shows API 403 ExportNotAllowed matching BR-09 rbac-negative behavior
cases.expected: BR-09 UI journey: instructor export denied with localized Vietnamese message; no CSV download; mirrors API denial

cases.title: Permission guard on POST /reports/export evaluates report:export before handler
preconditions: API route wired with permission guard per roles-permissions §2.4
Real PostgreSQL with export-eligible attendance data
Test fixtures for Instructor and TrainingOfficeAdmin AuthSession rows
steps: Dispatch POST /reports/export request context with Instructor role through permission guard middleware
Assert guard returns 403 ExportNotAllowed without invoking ExportService CSV generation
Dispatch same request with TrainingOfficeAdmin role
Assert guard passes to ExportService handler
Assert only TrainingOfficeAdmin requests reach export_audit_logs insert path
cases.expected: Integration boundary: permission guard enforces BR-09 report:export admin-only before domain handler; deny by default per roles-permissions §2.4
